title: Lucid Q2 2024 Earnings: Gravity SUV Ramp Accelerates
text: Lucid's Q2 2024 earnings showed accelerating production and strong delivery growth. Gravity SUV production ramping ahead of schedule with first customer vehicles expected in Q4. Revenue beat expectations at $200.6M reflecting strong Air demand before Gravity mix shift. Management affirmed 9,000 vehicle full-year guidance. PIF funding commitment extended liquidity runway significantly. Gravity represents critical inflection for scaling production and revenue. Success on Gravity ramp is essential for company achieving profitability targets.
